implementation_drift.description: Two substring misreads caught and corrected inline: 'programmed frameshift' is NOT in 'programmed ribosomal frameshifting' (the words 'ribosomal' intervenes between 'programmed' and 'frameshifting'). Same for KnotInFrame paper.

honest_note: Direct 'same content, two frames via structural cue' substantive prior art is thinner than usual rounds. Role prompting and multi-agent personas achieve a similar end via different mechanism, so the practical effect is occupied even if the mechanism specifically isn't.
